source: VS Code Copilot agent hook log (Output panel), 2026-07-13, session fd634936, model claude-sonnet-4.6, monoroot multi-root workspace at c:\Dev\Projects\worktrees\4194-test
note: The ORDERED event stream of a real feature-lane session, verbatim from the host log, up to the first subagent return. This is the session in which the orchestrator abandoned the workflow: @discovery 'completed with no output', [BUDGET:unclassified] fired on every tool call, and trace/ and handoff/ stayed empty. Replaying it through the real hook processes is the only test that reproduces the failure end to end — every per-function test in this repo passed while it was happening. The final `Stop` event is appended by the suite (the log excerpt ends before session close); every other event is as captured. `cwd` is rebased onto a temp workspace by the suite; the fixture on disk is never edited.

events.prompt:
Let's implement this feature

## User Story
As a shipper or internal user I want to go directly to the delivery of a batch so I can start making changes to batches

events.tool_response:
Classifying the task by intent and scope now; I’ll return a single JSON object with the lane, budget class, and confidence based on whether it’s new capability, defect, or maintenance work.

{"agentName":"router","lane":"feature","budgetClass":"standard","confidence":0.94}
